response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with over a decade of full-stack development experience, including senior and staff-level roles. His resume demonstrates deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, coupled with extensive experience in cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker) and modern engineering practices like TDD and CI/CD. His recent involvement in AI agent infrastructure and founder experience further highlight his technical leadership and ability to deliver end-to-end solutions, making him an excellent fit for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development, including senior/staff-level roles.
Strong proficiency in key primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure development, TDD, and architectural contributions.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or specific Vitest framework experience.
Limited explicit mention of Kotlin or PostgreSQL, though other databases and languages are covered.
Security best practices are not explicitly detailed, though implied by senior experience.

key_factors.factor: AI Agent Development & Strong Engineering Practices
